message:
test: expand FABRIC integration, replay promotion, golden fixtures, and WASM contract coverage

tests/fabric_lab_integration.rs (+542 lines):
- Capability grant/revoke lifecycle under LabRuntime with scope-narrowing
  and subject-based revocation
- FabricCompiler cost estimation round-trip through LabRuntime
- Morphism export/import boundary plan compilation with reply-space
  selection and capability attachment
- ServiceObligation lifecycle: reserve→complete, reserve→fail(timeout),
  reserve→transfer with hop chain tracking
- FabricConsumerConfig/State lifecycle: idle→active→paused→resume→draining

tests/replay_e2e_suite.rs (+69 lines):
- Fuzz regression corpus promotion into dual-run scenarios with
  seed plan, identity, and nondeterminism note verification

tests/semantic_golden_fixture_validation.rs (+109 lines):
- Dual-run harness contract golden fixture: build canonical identity
  and seed plan, serialize to JSON, compare against locked golden file
- Validates shared harness identity and seed-lineage roundtrip

tests/lab_live_scenario_adapter_contract.rs (+226 lines):
- Scenario adapter contract tests: lab config derivation, SporkScenario
  config creation, scenario runner launch, and repro manifest generation
- Live adapter simulation using LIVE_CURRENT_THREAD_ADAPTER

tests/lab_live_verification_taxonomy_contract.rs (+87 lines):
- External surface gate requirements for divergence corpus registry
  fields and lifecycle markers

tests/wasm_ga_go_no_go_evidence_packet.rs (+39 lines):
- Optional-lane operator decision law token verification

tests/wasm_troubleshooting_compendium.rs (+55 lines):
- Section K token verification and evidence bundle pointer checks

tests/messaging_fabric_progressive_disclosure_contract.rs:
- Add subject.rs path inclusion for standalone IR contract tests
- Allow clippy::duplicate_mod for test module structure

tests/fixtures/semantic_golden/:
- manifest.json: add golden-dual-run-harness-contract entry with
  rule_ids differential.shared_harness.contract and
  differential.seed_lineage.roundtrip
- dual_run_harness_contract.json: locked golden fixture file

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,64 @@
+{
+  "schema_version": "semantic-golden-fixture-v1",
+  "fixture_id": "golden-dual-run-harness-contract",
+  "rule_ids": [
+    "differential.shared_harness.contract",
+    "differential.seed_lineage.roundtrip"
+  ],
+  "description": "Expected shared dual-run identity and provenance records for the canonical harness contract case",
+  "identity": {
+    "schema_version": "lab-live-scenario-spec-v1",
+    "scenario_id": "phase1.cancel.race.one_loser",
+    "surface_id": "cancel.race",
+    "surface_contract_version": "cancel.race.v1",
+    "description": "Single loser is cancelled and drained",
+    "phase": "Phase 1",
+    "seed_plan": {
+      "canonical_seed": 42,
+      "seed_lineage_id": "seed.phase1.cancel.race.one_loser.v1",
+      "lab_seed_mode": "inherit",
+      "live_seed_mode": "override",
+      "replay_policy": "single_seed",
+      "lab_seed_override": null,
+      "live_seed_override": 99,
+      "entropy_seed_override": 777
+    }
+  },
+  "lab_runtime": {
+    "seed": 42,
+    "entropy_seed": 777
+  },
+  "lab_replay": {
+    "execution_instance_id": "phase1.cancel.race.one_loser:lab:0x2A:0",
+    "effective_seed": 42,
+    "effective_entropy_seed": 777,
+    "surface_id": "cancel.race",
+    "surface_contract_version": "cancel.race.v1"
+  },
+  "live_context": {
+    "adapter": "live.current_thread",
+    "seed": 99,
+    "execution_instance_id": "phase1.cancel.race.one_loser:live:0x63:0",
+    "surface_id": "cancel.race",
+    "surface_contract_version": "cancel.race.v1",
+    "seed_lineage_id": "seed.phase1.cancel.race.one_loser.v1"
+  },
+  "seed_lineage": {
+    "seed_lineage_id": "seed.phase1.cancel.race.one_loser.v1",
+    "canonical_seed": 42,
+    "lab_effective_seed": 42,
+    "live_effective_seed": 99,
+    "lab_seed_mode": "inherit",
+    "live_seed_mode": "override",
+    "lab_entropy_seed": 777,
+    "live_entropy_seed": 777,
+    "replay_policy": "single_seed",
+    "seeds_match": false
+  },
+  "invariants": [
+    "Scenario family identity is shared across lab and live adapters",
+    "Seed lineage records explicit live overrides instead of hiding them",
+    "Live current-thread provenance keeps the same surface contract as lab",
+    "Explicit entropy overrides are retained in both replay metadata and seed lineage"
+  ]
+}

@@ -301,3 +301,42 @@ fn release_docs_define_vnext_surface_promotion_and_packet_rows() {
         );
     }
 }
+
+#[test]
+fn release_strategy_doc_defines_optional_lane_operator_decision_law() {
+    let strategy = load_release_strategy_doc();
+
+    for token in [
+        "## Optional-Lane Operator Decision Law",
+        "support_class",
+        "reason_code",
+        "fallback_lane_id",
+        "lane_health_status",
+        "lane_health_failure_count",
+        "lane_health_retry_budget_remaining",
+        "lane_health_cooldown_until_ms",
+        "lane_health_last_trigger",
+        "demoted_lane_id",
+        "repro_command",
+        "policy_schema_version",
+        "python3 scripts/check_wasm_worker_offload_policy.py --policy .github/wasm_worker_offload_policy.json",
+        "artifacts/wasm_worker_offload_summary.json",
+        "python3 scripts/check_wasm_benchmark_corpus.py --policy .github/wasm_benchmark_corpus.json",
+        "artifacts/wasm_benchmark_corpus_summary.json",
+        "python3 scripts/check_perf_regression.py --budgets .github/wasm_perf_budgets.json --profile core-min",
+        "artifacts/wasm_perf_regression_report.json",
+        "artifacts/wasm_perf_gate_events.ndjson",
+        "rch exec -- ./scripts/run_perf_e2e.sh --bench phase0_baseline --bench scheduler_benchmark --seed 42 --metric p95_ns",
+        "rch exec -- bash ./scripts/run_nightly_stress_soak.sh --ci --suites cancellation_stress,scheduler_fairness --timeout 3600",
+        "target/nightly-stress/<run_id>/trend_report.json",
+        "preview_only",
+        "guarded canary-only",
+        "nightly-only",
+        "shared_array_buffer_requires_cross_origin_isolation",
+    ] {
+        assert!(
+            strategy.contains(token),
+            "release strategy doc missing optional-lane operator token: {token}"
+        );
+    }
+}

@@ -172,3 +172,58 @@ fn troubleshooting_doc_covers_browser_storage_and_artifact_failure_paths() {
         );
     }
 }
+
+#[test]
+fn troubleshooting_doc_defines_optional_lane_rollout_and_no_go_policy() {
+    let doc = load_doc();
+    for token in [
+        "### K. Optional-Lane Rollout, Demotion, and No-Go Policy",
+        "support_class",
+        "reason_code",
+        "fallback_lane_id",
+        "lane_health_status",
+        "lane_health_failure_count",
+        "lane_health_retry_budget_remaining",
+        "demoted_lane_id",
+        "repro_command",
+        "preview_only",
+        "guarded canary-only",
+        "nightly-only",
+        "SharedArrayBuffer",
+        "WebTransport",
+        "MessageChannel",
+        "MessagePort",
+        "BroadcastChannel",
+    ] {
+        assert!(
+            doc.contains(token),
+            "Troubleshooting compendium missing optional-lane policy token: {token}"
+        );
+    }
+}
+
+#[test]
+fn troubleshooting_doc_points_to_optional_lane_evidence_bundle() {
+    let doc = load_doc();
+    for token in [
+        "python3 scripts/check_wasm_worker_offload_policy.py",
+        ".github/wasm_worker_offload_policy.json",
+        "python3 scripts/check_wasm_benchmark_corpus.py",
+        ".github/wasm_benchmark_corpus.json",
+        "python3 scripts/check_perf_regression.py",
+        "artifacts/wasm_worker_offload_summary.json",
+        "artifacts/wasm_benchmark_corpus_summary.json",
+        "artifacts/wasm_perf_regression_report.json",
+        "artifacts/wasm_perf_gate_events.ndjson",
+        "rch exec -- ./scripts/run_perf_e2e.sh",
+        "rch exec -- bash ./scripts/run_nightly_stress_soak.sh",
+        "target/nightly-stress/<run_id>/trend_report.json",
+        "target/nightly-stress/<run_id>/run_manifest.json",
+        "docs/wasm_release_channel_strategy.md",
+    ] {
+        assert!(
+            doc.contains(token),
+            "Troubleshooting compendium missing optional-lane evidence token: {token}"
+        );
+    }
+}
